reviews.comment:
Medios de pagos varios: efectivo y debito o crédito
No ofrecen desayuno. Te cobran el café y aparte elegís con que acompañar
Baños limpios
No ofrecen limpiar vidrios ni revisar agua o aceite

(Translated by Google)
Various payment methods: cash, debit, or credit card. Breakfast is not offered. Coffee is charged separately, and you choose what to have with it. Bathrooms are clean. They do not offer window cleaning or checks for water or oil.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVNU9iZGx3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El precio del combustible más caro que en otras estaciones, se aprovechan por el lugar donde están, las instalaciones mediocres y deterioradas, el personal bien, acordé a las actividades que desarrollan, lo único que sumó en esta oportunidad.

(Translated by Google)
The fuel price is higher than at other stations, they take advantage of the location, the facilities are mediocre and deteriorated, the staff is fine, in accordance with the activities they carry out, the only thing that added up on this occasion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURreF9ER2VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar para descansar y tomar un buen desayuno o almorzar una exquisita minuta mientras atienden tu vehículo
Esta estación esta próxima al cruce de la ruta 60 que va hacia Chimbicha a 70 km  y la la ruta que va hacia San Fernando de Catamarca que se encuentra a 86 km doblando a mano derecha
Hacia mano izquierda se está sobre la ruta que va hacia la pcia de La Rioja a 145 km
La atención es muy buena tanto en el expendio de combustible como en el Snack bar

(Translated by Google)
A place to rest and enjoy a good breakfast or a delicious lunch while your vehicle is being serviced.
This station is near the intersection of Route 60, which leads to Chimbicha (70 km away), and the road to San Fernando de Catamarca (86 km away), turning right. To the left is the road to La Rioja province (145 km away). The service is excellent, both at the pump and in the snack bar.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrd1lqUnpRRRAB

Good service, doesn't offer meals, only snacks. It has a small outdoor area with tables and chairs.
